svg.title: Synalux POS — franchise
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for franchise. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Location list, P&L comparison, config push, brand compliance -- DB: pos_franchise_configs + pos_locations

Suburbs North missing logo on receipts
RLS: corporate admin role bypasses location scoping | Royalty: daily cron on pos_payments | Push: /api/pos/franchise/push
Synalux POS -- Franchise Corporate Dashboard -- 12 Locations -- May 2026
